testcase.name: technical staff can create and update a management plan with audit fields

testcase.failure: technical staff can create and update a management plan with audit fieldsExpected response status code [201, 301, 302, 303, 307, 308] but received 419. testcase.name: viewer can view management plans but cannot create or delete them
